extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won from a reduced sprint after late break caught at 5km, surviving chaos that eliminated GEOGHEGAN HART Tao from GC contention.
tactical_patterns: Caja Rural accelerated late to thin sprinter field for selective finish, separating weaker fast-finishers before final 30km.
Breakaway survived until 5km despite multiple sprint teams chasing, suggesting coordination issues or strategic miscalculation among leadout trains.
MILAN Jonathan extending points lead via intermediate sprint while in peloton shows calculated energy management over pure stage hunting.
ACKERMANN Pascal winning with minimal team support (only GIBBONS helping) reveals UAE leadout weakness compared to solo positioning skill.

rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: negative: Eliminated from Giro on wet descent crash at 78km remaining, was sitting third overall before abandonment.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Crashed on same descent but continued, retains maglia rosa by 2 seconds despite losing key teammate.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Also crashed on wet descent but damage contained, now second at 2 seconds having survived attrition.
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: Suffering illness again before late-race crash, showing vulnerability in consecutive sprint opportunities.
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: positive: Won intermediate sprint against PEDERSEN Mads while conserving energy, extends ciclamino lead with tactical maturity.
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: First Giro win since 2019 despite essentially zero team support, outsprinted MILAN in photo finish.
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Third place shows strong form returning, positioned brilliantly despite reduced sprint train support.
